creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
On Thu, Jul 13, 2006 at 10:10:35PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/zope,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/100249 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/100249

I approve this Patch

Bye
   Estartu>
